name: Air Elemental (Strong)
description: Lesser air spirits. Use earth affinity spells against them.

name: Air Elemental (Weak)
description: Lesser air spirits. Use earth affinity spells against them.

name: Arch Dragon
description: The most intelligent of all dragons but at the same time, one of the most evil.

name: Asura
description: A deity that lay imprisoned in the depths of Leá Monde for centuries.

name: Basilisk
description: Powerful jaws give these small, agile reptiles a savage attack.

name: Bat
description: Large, agile bats that swoop down to strike from the air.

name: Bejart
description: One of the Crimson Blades accompanying Duane.

name: Blood Lizard
description: A subspecies of Lizardmen with superior protection against fire and heat.

name: Crimson Blade (Type A)
description: One of the basic Crimson Blade soldiers. Located in Wine Cellar.

name: Crimson Blade (Type B)
description: One of the basic Crimson Blade soldiers. Located in Wine Cellar.

name: Crimson Blade (Type C)
description: One of the basic Crimson Blade soldiers. Located in Town Centre West.

name: Crimson Blade (Type D)
description: One of the basic Crimson Blade soldiers. Located in Town Centre West.

name: Crimson Blade (Type E)
description: One of the basic Crimson Blade soldiers. Located in Town Centre South.

name: Crimson Blade (Type F)
description: One of the basic Crimson Blade soldiers. Located in Town Centre West.

name: Crimson Blade (Type G)
description: One of the basic Crimson Blade soldiers. Located in Town Centre South.

name: Crimson Blade (Type H)
description: One of the basic Crimson Blade soldiers. Located in Town Centre South.

name: Crimson Blade (Type I)
description: One of the basic Crimson Blade soldiers. Located in Town Centre East.

name: Crimson Blade (Type J)
description: One of the basic Crimson Blade soldiers. Located in Town Centre East.

name: Crimson Blade (Type K)
description: One of the basic Crimson Blade soldiers. Located in Town Centre East.

name: Damascus Crab
description: Crabs with shells as hard as Damascus. Weapons made from their shells are rare and valued.

name: Damascus Golem
description: Golem made of the rare alloy Damascus. Highly resistant to both magical and physical attacks.

name: Dao
description: Earth daeva. An evil spirit who casts baneful spells to state its yearning for human life.

name: Dark Crusader (Strong)
description: An armor relic of the holy wars. Its only weakness is the gap below its chest plate.

name: Dark Crusader (Weak)
description: An armor relic of the holy wars. Its only weakness is the gap below its chest plate.

name: Dark Dragon
description: Dragons of the Underworld who feast on human flesh and souls.

name: Dark Elemental (Strong)
description: Lesser spirits of darkness. More powerful than the other elemental spirits in Leá Monde.

name: Dark Elemental (Weak)
description: Lesser spirits of darkness. More powerful than the other elemental spirits in Leá Monde.

name: Dark Eye
description: Often called "the Devil's Eye", these monsters are well versed in magic.

name: Dark Skeleton
description: Skeletons the dark has bestowed with more power and better defense.

name: Death
description: The reaper of the Underworld, tasked with claiming the souls of the powerful.

name: Djinn
description: Air daeva. This violent, angry spirit serves no moral master.

name: Dragon
description: These legendary creatures possess a cruel and cunning intellect.

name: Dragon Zombie
description: Powerful zombies who crave souls tainted by the Dark.

name: Duane
description: Brother of Grissom, and a Commander in the Crimson Blades.

name: Dullahan (Strong)
description: Knightly armor possessed by the Dark and capable of magical and physical attacks.

name: Dullahan (Weak)
description: Knightly armor possessed by the Dark and capable of magical and physical attacks.

name: Dummy (Affinity)
description: Found in Worker's Breakroom [Wine Cellar]. This is the special Affinity Dummy.

name: Dummy (Beast)
description: Found in The Dark Tunnel [Abandoned Mines B1]

name: Dummy (Dragon)
description: Found in The Boy's Training Room [City Walls South].

name: Dummy (Evil)
description: Found in Gharmes Walk [Town Centre East].

name: Dummy (Human)
description: Found in Blackmarket of Wines [Wine Cellar]. This is the normal Human Dummy.

name: Dummy (Phantom)
description: Found in From Boy to Hero [City Walls North].

name: Dummy (Undead)
description: Found in Hall of Sworn Revenge [Catacombs].

name: Earth Dragon
description: Also known as Land Dragons, their tough hides are nigh impossible to pierce.

name: Earth Elemental (Strong)
description: Low-level earth spirits. Originally benevolent spirits, magic has twisted them to evil.

name: Earth Elemental (Weak)
description: Low-level earth spirits. Originally benevolent spirits, magic has twisted them to evil.

name: Fire Elemental (Strong)
description: Lesser fire spirits. Vicious opponents with firey magic at their disposal.

name: Fire Elemental (Weak)
description: Lesser fire spirits. Vicious opponents with firey magic at their disposal.

name: Flame Dragon
description: Large dragons who draw energy from magma.

name: Gargoyle
description: Sculptures of mythical creatures that have come to life.

name: Ghast
description: The living dead, given power by demons of the Underworld.

name: Ghost (Strong)
description: Souls of the deceased that attack any living thing in sight.

name: Ghost (Weak)
description: Souls of the deceased that attack any living thing in sight.

name: Ghoul (One Arm)
description: Ghouls lurk in the Catacombs, longing for human flesh. Attacking their heads proves effective.

name: Ghoul (Two Arm)
description: Ghouls lurk in the Catacombs, longing for human flesh. Attacking their heads proves effective.

name: Giant Crab
description: Giant crabs whose acidic breath can melt even the strongest armor.

name: Goblin
description: Stocky demihumans that form bands to attack their prey.

name: Goblin Leader
description: Goblins endowed with the ability to use magic. They make their abode in the Undercity.

name: Golem
description: Creatures moulded from granite, they deliver tremendous physical attacks.

name: Goodwin
description: He and Sackheim have been left behind by the rest of the Crimson Blades.

name: Gremlin
description: Pernicious demons that use varied weaponry and cast magic.

name: Grissom
description: Duane's brother, an adept in the dark arts and Commander in the Crimson Blades.

name: Guildenstern (Form 1)
description: Leader of the Crimson Blades, Guildenstern heads the hunt for Sydney.

name: Guildenstern (Form 2)
description: Leader of the Crimson Blades, Guildenstern heads the hunt for Sydney.

name: Harpy (Strong)
description: Birds of the Underworld feared for their unmerciful spell of death.

name: Harpy (Weak)
description: Birds of the Underworld feared for their unmerciful spell of death.

name: Hellhound
description: These hounds once guarded the gates of the Underworld.

name: Ichthious
description: Fish-like forest spirits with armored heads. Their magic gives them an extra edge in battle.

name: Ifrit
description: Fire daeva. An arrogant spirit who enjoys burning humans with its spells.

name: Imp
description: Messengers of the Underworld that swoop down to attack with weapons and magic.

name: Iron Crab
description: Crabs with shells of iron. Employ their massive weight as a lethal weapon.

name: Iron Golem
description: Golems crafted from iron. Their strong bodies are impervious to physical attacks.

name: Kali
description: Statue of the goddess of destruction that the Dark instilled with unholy life.

name: Last Crusader (Strong)
description: Possessed crimson armor, once the special raiment of the Holy Knights.

name: Last Crusader (Weak)
description: Possessed crimson armor, once the special raiment of the Holy Knights.

name: Lich
description: Evil mages who have gained powerful magic and eternal life through demonic pacts.

name: Lich Lord
description: Liches with even greater magical knowledge who are said to practice ancient Kildean sorcery.

name: Lizardman (Strong)
description: A species of demihumans known for their agility and strength.

name: Lizardman (Weak)
description: A species of demihumans known for their agility and strength.

name: Mandel
description: Left for dead by the rest of the Crimson Blades.

name: Marid
description: Water daeva. Sunk Leá Monde in to the waters 25 years ago with the aid of Dao, the earth daeva.

name: Mimic
description: Large insects that mimic chests of treasure to lure unwary treasure hunters.

name: Minotaur
description: Half-beast, half-human monster well known for its expert use of a viciously heavy mace.

name: Minotaur Lord
description: Minotaurs with tattoos of magic protection enscribed upon their bodies.

name: Minotaur Zombie
description: Minotaur zombies. They feel no pain, and they fight till their death.

name: Mullenkamp Soldier (Type 1)
description: Taking part in the raid on Duke Bardorba's Manor.

name: Mullenkamp Soldier (Type 2)
description: Taking part in the raid on Duke Bardorba's Manor.

name: Mummy
description: Ancient Kildean corpses infused with the power of the Dark.

name: Neesa
description: One of the Crimson Blade Commanders, she is close to Tieger.

name: Nightmare
description: Dark daeva. It is filled with an unsatiable craving to see the living suffer.

name: Nightstalker (Strong)
description: Spirits of fallen soldiers, unaffected by chain abilities.

name: Nightstalker (Weak)
description: Spirits of fallen soldiers, unaffected by chain abilities.

name: Ogre (Strong)
description: Demons that fought humans in mythical times. Extremely agile and strong.

name: Ogre (Weak)
description: Demons that fought humans in mythical times. Extremely agile and strong.

name: Ogre Lord (Strong)
description: Highly intelligent ogres with arcane spell knowledge.

name: Ogre Lord (Weak)
description: Highly intelligent ogres with arcane spell knowledge.

name: Ogre Zombie
description: Dead ogres restored to life by necromancy.

name: Orc
description: Porcine demihumans that are able to use magic spells and any weapon they can find.

name: Orc Leader
description: Commanders of the orcs. Like their kin they attack in packs with weapons and magic.

name: Poison Slime (Strong)
description: Slime with the ability to spew poisonous spores.

name: Poison Slime (Weak)
description: Slime with the ability to spew poisonous spores.

name: Quicksilver
description: Dolls possessed by the souls of children who lost their lives to war or illness.

name: Ravana
description: A mechanical statue of a deity engineered in the era of Müllenkamp.

name: Rosencrantz
description: A disgraced ex-Riskbreaker, his loyalty lies only with himself.

name: Sackheim
description: He and Goodwin have been left behind by the rest of the Crimson Blades.

name: Sarjik
description: One of the Crimson Blades accompanying Duane.

name: Shadow
description: Shadows bereft of bodies, commanded by the Dark.

name: Shrieker
description: Dolls possessed by evil spirits. Their shrieks kill all within earshot.

name: Silver Wolf
description: Wolves, twisted in to ferocious man-hunters by the Dark's influence.

name: Skeleton (One Arm)
description: Skeletal remains of zombie corpses. They lurk in darkness to attack the living.

name: Skeleton (Two Arm)
description: Skeletal remains of zombie corpses. They lurk in darkness to attack the living.

name: Skeleton Knight
description: The bleached skeletons of former Kingsguard knights. Still possess skill with blades.

name: Sky Dragon
description: Large dragons inhabiting the clouds, they are also known as Thunder Dragons.

name: Slime (Strong)
description: These normally slothful and large amoeba-like creatures can leap to assault their prey.

name: Slime (Weak)
description: These normally slothful and large amoeba-like creatures can leap to assault their prey.

name: Snow Dragon
description: Because of their freezing breath, these dragons are often called the "Wyrms of Ice".

name: Stirge
description: Giant vampire bats rumored to drain a victim's life in a single blow.

name: Sydney
description: The leader of the Müllenkamp cult, he has fled into the dead city of Leá Monde.

name: Tieger
description: One of the Crimson Blade Commanders, he is close to Neesa.

name: Water Elemental (Strong)
description: Lesser water spirits. Do not approach them without first preparing a suitable defense.

name: Water Elemental (Weak)
description: Lesser water spirits. Do not approach them without first preparing a suitable defense.

name: Wraith
description: Ghosts of the Underworld capable of casting potent magic.

name: Wyvern (Strong)
description: Lesser wyrms with deadly breath attacks.

name: Wyvern (Weak)
description: Lesser wyrms with deadly breath attacks.

name: Wyvern Knight
description: A ferocious subspecies of dragon. They rarely appear above ground.

name: Wyvern Queen
description: Queen of dragons. Her rule is total and her spawn would readily give their lives for her.

name: Zombie (One Arm)
description: Once the inhabitants of Leá Monde, zombies emerge from the dark to attack the living.

name: Zombie (Two Arm)
description: Once the inhabitants of Leá Monde, zombies emerge from the dark to attack the living.

name: Zombie Fighter
description: Corpses of Leá Monde's soldiers, brought back to life through the Dark's taint.

name: Zombie Knight (One Arm)
description: Zombies of the Knights of the Cross, still in possession of potent martial skills.

name: Zombie Knight (Two Arm)
description: Zombies of the Knights of the Cross, still in possession of potent martial skills.

name: Zombie Mage
description: Zombies of Leá Monde's mages, who employ powerful offensive magic.
